cues.text: 你休假的時候一般做什麼？
cues.tr: What do you usually do when you are on vacation?
cues.speaker: A

cues.text: 我喜歡去旅行。你呢？
cues.tr: I like traveling. What about you?
cues.speaker: B

cues.text: 我也喜歡旅行。你上次去哪裡旅行了？
cues.tr: I like traveling too. Where did you travel last time?
cues.speaker: A

cues.text: 我上次去了桂林，風景很美。
cues.tr: I went to Guilin last time. The scenery was very beautiful.
cues.speaker: B

cues.text: 真的嗎？我一直想去桂林。你玩了哪些地方？
cues.tr: Really? I've always wanted to go to Guilin. What places did you visit?
cues.speaker: A

cues.text: 我去了漓江和陽朔，還坐了竹筏。
cues.tr: I went to Li River and Yangshuo, and rode a bamboo raft.
cues.speaker: B

cues.text: 聽起來很有意思！你住在那裡的什麼地方？
cues.tr: That sounds interesting! Which place did you stay there?
cues.speaker: A

cues.text: 我住在一個小旅館，環境很好，交通非常方便，服務也很熱情。
cues.tr: I stayed in a small hotel. The environment was very nice, the transportation was very convenient, and the service was very warm.
cues.speaker: B

cues.text: 那裡的食物好吃嗎？
cues.tr: Was the food good?
cues.speaker: A

cues.text: 很好吃，我特別喜歡那裡的米粉。
cues.tr: Very good, I especially like the rice noodles there.
cues.speaker: B

cues.text: 除了旅行，你休假的時候還喜歡做什麼？
cues.tr: Besides traveling, what else do you like to do when you are on vacation?
cues.speaker: A

cues.text: 我還喜歡看書和看電影。你呢？
cues.tr: I like to read books and watch movies. What about you?
cues.speaker: B

cues.text: 我喜歡運動，休假的時候經常去游泳。
cues.tr: I like sports. I often go swimming when I'm on vacation.
cues.speaker: A

cues.text: 游泳不錯，我也喜歡。你游泳游得怎麼樣？
cues.tr: Swimming is good, I like it too. How well do you swim?
cues.speaker: B

cues.text: 我游得還可以，不過還需要多練習。
cues.tr: I'm not bad, but I need more practice.
cues.speaker: A

cues.text: 我也是，下次我們可以一起去游泳。
cues.tr: So do I. Next time we can go swimming together.
cues.speaker: B

cues.text: 好主意！還有什麼是你喜歡做的事嗎？
cues.tr: Good idea! Is there anything else you like to do?
cues.speaker: A

cues.text: 我喜歡做飯，尤其是做中國菜。你呢？
cues.tr: I like cooking, especially Chinese food. What about you?
cues.speaker: B

cues.text: 我喜歡畫畫，有時候會畫一些風景畫。
cues.tr: I like to paint, sometimes I paint landscapes.
cues.speaker: A

cues.text: 那你畫過桂林的風景嗎？
cues.tr: Have you ever painted a landscape in Guilin?
cues.speaker: B

cues.text: 還沒呢，我想等我去過桂林後再畫。
cues.tr: Not yet, I want to wait until I've been to Guilin.
cues.speaker: A

cues.text: 那太好了，我們可以一起去桂林旅行。
cues.tr: That's great, we can travel to Guilin together.
cues.speaker: B

cues.text: 好啊，我們可以一起去看看那裡的美景，然後我再畫。
cues.tr: Yes, we can go there together to see the beautiful scenery, and then I will paint it.
cues.speaker: A

cues.text: 沒問題，我們一起計劃一下吧！
cues.tr: No problem, let's plan it together!
cues.speaker: B
